evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Designed model monitoring stack including data drift detection and prediction distribution checks
evidence.source_text: Designed the model monitoring stack: data drift detection, prediction distribution checks, and alerting.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Churn prediction model improved customer success outreach prioritization
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via ranking model
Mentored a junior engineer through an end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Pragmatic approach to debugging and system design
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.

evidence.claim: Focuses on infrastructure and data quality over modeling
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.
